reason: Two bugs prevented valid RL training and hard gate evaluation. Bug 1: _v07d2_live_features used hardcoded np.zeros((n,97)) instead of _V07D2_FEAT_DIM=96, causing silent shape-mismatch exception in all 200 games/iter (97-dim array vs 96-dim model). All n_valid_games=0. Bug 2: pipeline-generated main.py used 97-dim _V06D15MainScorer; Part B loader check failed (size mismatch net.0.weight [512,96] vs expected [512,97]). IL baseline evaluation completed successfully on 96-dim features: wm_96dim_il=-0.0059 (wt1=0.538, lt1=0.544). Hard gate: FAIL (Part B). Both bugs identified and fixable in v07d10.
artifact_reuse: v06d18 IL weights (truncated [:,:96]); v06d18 feature matrix (loaded, [:,:96] sliced)

winner_margin_summary.note: No RL training occurred (0 valid games). Margin is pure 96-dim IL baseline. stored == inference (no dim96 distinction after fix). Compare with 97-dim IL baseline: -0.0037.

training_summary.rl_algo: online PPO (bug: live_features returned 97-dim, model expected 96-dim)
training_summary.bug_1: _v07d2_live_features: np.zeros((n,97)) hardcoded (not _V07D2_FEAT_DIM). All model calls threw RuntimeError, caught silently. Fix: use _V07D2_FEAT_DIM in zeros() calls.
training_summary.bug_2: Part B main.py: pipeline generates _V06D15MainScorer with Linear(97,512). v07d9 model is 96-dim. Fix: patch main.py in Cell[23] after RL training (replace Linear(97 with Linear(96, remove X[:,96]=1.0).

exploration_summary: dim96 removal confirmed to change IL baseline: 96-dim IL wm=-0.0059 vs 97-dim IL wm=-0.0037. The dim96 leakage was helping IL discrimination slightly. After dim96 removal, stored==inference eval (no more distinction needed). Both bugs in v07d9 are easily fixable. v07d10 should apply the two fixes and re-run the experiment.
known_risks: 96-dim IL baseline (-0.0059) is slightly worse than 97-dim IL baseline (-0.0037): removing dim96 leakage reduces IL's discriminative shortcut
Part B main.py needs patching for every future 96-dim version until the pipeline itself is updated
The 96-dim winner_margin (-0.0059) is the new honest baseline for future 96-dim experiments
next_candidates: [aggressive] v07d10: fix 2 bugs (live_features 97→96, patch main.py for 96-dim) and re-run dim96 removal + online PPO lambda_il=0.5. Same hypothesis, correct implementation.
[conservative] v07d10-alt: revert to 97-dim but fix evaluation (set dim96=1.0 for all in training data) — simpler fix, keeps 97-dim architecture
